sprint: Auth Provider Switching — Phase 5: End-to-End Validation

manager_assessment.overall_status: 🟡 T-001 NEAR PASS — Root cause identified and fixed. waitForURL predicate was calling .includes() on a URL object instead of a string — TypeError on every A2 attempt, cascading to all downstream tests. Fix c84a78a adds .toString(). Run 25490149751 (SHA 46f9aed) is the first post-fix run — conclusion unknown. Observer declares PASS or reports new error this cycle. Operator ships TASK-E, TASK-F, and begins TASK-H tech debt.
key_events: Run #75 (25489542409, SHA bf74ed3): 4 tests pass independently (A1, B1, D2, E1). All others cascade from A2 TypeError.
Root cause: url.includes is not a function — waitForURL predicate receives URL object, not string. Fix: .toString() added in c84a78a.
Run 25490149751 (SHA 46f9aed) triggered post-fix — in_progress at step 4 as of Cycle 28.
Run 25489986060 (SHA b56a407) may also have concluded — Observer checks.
T-007 + T-010 live as a815e93. Deploy gate lifted. No new app deploy needed on T-001 PASS.
TASK-E and TASK-F still pending Operator action.
active_blockers: Run 25490149751 conclusion unknown — could be T-001 PASS this cycle
If A2 still fails post-fix: Google OAuth bot-detection may be secondary blocker — Observer must pivot to session injection immediately

in_progress.title: T-001 — Check conclusion of run 25490149751 and declare PASS or escalate
in_progress.manager_instruction: Check latestObserverQaDetail for run 25490149751 (SHA 46f9aed). Also check run 25489986060 (SHA b56a407) if not yet resolved. If SUCCESS → declare 🟢 T-001 PASS — DEPLOY SIGNAL in QA_REPORT.md (no new app deploy needed — T-007+T-010 already live as a815e93). If FAILURE at A2 → report exact error verbatim. If it is OAuth/bot-detection (Google login stuck, challenge page, redirect loop) → pivot IMMEDIATELY to session injection — do not push another OAuth fix. If failure at a different step → report verbatim error, diagnose, fix, push, trigger new run. Note live SHA from /api/version.

in_progress.title: Add error logging to getActiveProvider() DB fallback
in_progress.manager_instruction: In src/libs/auth-provider/index.ts, in the catch block that falls back to AUTH_PROVIDER env var, add: console.error('[getActiveProvider] DB error — falling back to env var:', err). Do not modify any exports. Small targeted change only. Commit and push. Update BUILD_LOG.md. This task is overdue — ship it this cycle.

in_progress.title: Fix smokeStatus reader in orchestrator — fs.readFileSync → GitHub API
in_progress.manager_instruction: In orchestrator.js (MCP server repo), replace fs.readFileSync('smoke-status.json') with a GitHub API fetch: const res = await fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/' + repo + '/contents/smoke-status.json', { headers: { ...ghHeaders, 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json' } }); const json = await res.json(); results.smokeStatus = json.content ? JSON.parse(Buffer.from(json.content, 'base64').toString()) : 'not found'; Commit to my-mcp-server repo and redeploy MCP server UUID a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw. Log the redeploy SHA and Coolify run ID in BUILD_LOG.md. This task is overdue — ship it this cycle.

in_progress.title: Tech debt pass — dead code, error handling, TS types, perf/security
in_progress.manager_instruction: After TASK-E and TASK-F are done, do a tech debt pass in src/. Candidates: dead code removal, error handling gaps (unhandled promise rejections, missing try/catch), missing TypeScript types (any casts, implicit any), performance improvements (unnecessary re-renders, missing memoization), security improvements (input validation, missing auth checks on API routes). Pick at least one concrete improvement, implement it, commit, and log in BUILD_LOG.md. Do not touch middleware.ts edge runtime or auth-provider/index.ts exports.
